name: aws-edge-content-delivery-and-security
description: Design, build, deploy, and operate Amazon CloudFront distributions and AWS WAF web ACLs for secure content delivery at the edge.

interface.displayName: AWS Edge Content Delivery and Security
interface.shortDescription: Build CloudFront CDN and WAF protection for production workloads.
interface.longDescription: AWS edge expertise for Amazon CloudFront (distributions, caching, origins, edge functions, mTLS, signed URLs, flat-rate pricing) and AWS WAF (managed rules, custom rules, bot control, rate limiting, L7 DDoS resilience) with production-ready CDK patterns and opinionated guidance.
defaultPrompt: Add CloudFront in front of my ALB with proper origin protection.
Write a baseline WAF web ACL for my API Gateway.
Debug why my CloudFront cache hit ratio is low.
